question: Will any of these AI companies (OpenAI, Anthropic, or Mistral AI) have a funding round in July 2026?

factors.description: Both OpenAI and Anthropic are IPO-track with closed 'final' pre-IPO rounds; TracXn shows zero new dated entries for either in May or June 2026 — the tranche follow-on cluster has already stopped.
Mistral has a live pending ~€3B raise (first reported June 12 2026) but in early discussions with no lead/close — a specific July close within ~6 weeks is possible but not established.

Boom-era historical monthly hit rates (Anthropic ~30%, OpenAI ~11%) elevate baseline, and TracXn logs small tranches/debt/grants/backfills as separate dated rows, adding noise that could yield a July entry.
Three of the world's most active fundraisers over a full month; low-probability tail of a fresh announcement or retroactively-dated entry.

summary: Question resolves YES if OpenAI, Anthropic, or Mistral has a TracXn funding round dated July 2026. Both OpenAI (Series F closed, S-1 filed) and Anthropic (Series H closed May, 'likely last private raise') are IPO-track with no pending private round — and critically, TracXn shows zero new dated entries for either in May or June 2026, indicating the mega-round tranche follow-ons have already stopped. Mistral's rumored ~€3B raise, only in early discussions as of mid-June with no lead investor or close, is the main path to a July entry but unlikely to finalize that fast. Building forward per-company (OpenAI ~7%, Anthropic ~7%, Mistral ~17%) gives ~29%, with a small uplift for TracXn dating lags and backfill noise, landing at ~0.34.
reasoning:
My forecast: **0.34** (34%).

**Reasoning:** The question resolves YES if OpenAI, Anthropic, or Mistral has a TracXn funding round dated July 2026. Key findings:

- **OpenAI** and **Anthropic** have both closed what are described as their final pre-IPO rounds (OpenAI's Series F, S-1 filed ~May; Anthropic's Series H, announced late May). Critically, TracXn shows **no new dated entries for either in May or June 2026** — the mega-round tranche follow-on cluster from Jan–Apr has already stopped, undercutting the case that follow-ons would spill into July.
- **Mistral** is the only live catalyst — a rumored ~€3B raise first reported June 12, but only in early discussions with no lead investor or close as of early July. A specific July close within ~6 weeks is possible but unlikely.

Building forward per-company (OpenAI ~7%, Anthropic ~7%, Mistral ~17%) gives ~29%, with a small uplift for TracXn's dating lags and tendency to backfill small/tranche/debt entries — landing at **~34%**.
